results.desc: WriteEntry stores entry and returns hash

Consecutive writes produce incrementing chain_position
First entry uses genesis hash
VerifyEntry on valid entry returns both valid
VerifyChain on valid chain returns chain_valid=true
GetChainTip returns latest entry
QueryEntries by agent_id returns only that agent

Multiple sources write concurrently without corruption
Three different agent_id formats coexist
Same correlation_id links entries with different agent_ids
Valid OCSF JSONL line produces ledger entry
class_uid 4001 maps to openshell.network_activity
class_uid 4002 maps to openshell.http_activity
Valid OTLP span produces correct entry_type

Span name llm.request maps correctly
OTLP resourceSpans envelope parsed correctly
Sample data loads 11 entries across 3 sources
trace-aaa correlates Kagenti + OpenShell
